title: Avery Mailing Labels
excerpt: Is there an easy way to print mailing labels from Monday? I just want to get mailing address onto an Avery 5160 label.

posts.author: mattcave (Matthew Cave)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there an easy way to print mailing labels from Monday? I just want to get mailing address onto an Avery 5160 label.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there! So sorry for the late reply!

If you’re still wondering about this, we don’t have a pre-built mailing label template or solution but we do have some apps in the monday app marketplace like Skiply’s QR Code Item Tracking app or the TrackMy app which could be helpful for keeping track of anything you have to mail.

I would also suggest using monday workdocs to make print mailing labels. You can embed your board with the addresses listed into your monday workdoc and then set the embedded board to only show the Location Column with the addresses.

Hopefully this helps but please let us know if you need help with this still at support@monday.com and we will be happy to get this sorted out together!
